steps.title: Convert square feet to square meters
steps.content:
Since $1$ meter is $3.28$ feet, square the length conversion for area.
$$(3.28)^2=10.7584$$
So $1$ square meter equals $10.7584$ square feet.

steps.title: Convert hours to minutes
steps.content:
Convert $330$ square feet per hour to square meters per minute.
$$\frac{330}{10.7584(60)}$$
This is about $0.51$ square meter per minute. The answer is D.
